response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of software engineering experience with strong recent alignment to the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production roles since 2020, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a required skill that is rare to find. A demonstrated testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, trunk-based development, authored test libraries, taught testing courses) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and limited depth in Kotlin/Java/Python; an education timeline that overlaps full-time employment is worth clarifying at interview.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience in recent production roles, including pricing systems at scale and AWS CDK infrastructure
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), directly matching a required and uncommon skill
Strong testing and software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored open-source test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, which is part of the primary stack
Limited recent depth in Kotlin, Java, and Python relative to the multi-language requirement
Education dates overlap concurrent full-time employment in a different country, which warrants verification

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
